reason: Remove .layer to match other middleware layer patterns (compressionLayer, errorLayer)
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/middleware/fence.ts b/packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/middleware/fence.ts
index f3bfe0668..74fdcb8c6 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/middleware/fence.ts
+++ b/packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/middleware/fence.ts
@@ -10,11 +10,11 @@ export const fenceLayer = HttpRouter.middleware<{ handles: unknown }>()((effect)
     const request = yield* HttpServerRequest.HttpServerRequest
     if (!Flag.OPENCODE_WORKSPACE_ID || ignoredMethods.has(request.method)) return yield* effect
 
-    const previous = Fence.load()
+    const previous = yield* Fence.load()
     const response = yield* effect
-    const current = Fence.diff(previous, Fence.load())
+    const current = Fence.diff(previous, yield* Fence.load())
     if (Object.keys(current).length === 0) return response
 
     return HttpServerResponse.setHeader(response, Fence.HEADER, JSON.stringify(current))
